current_entries.en_definition: (baseball) A pop-up ball: a ball that has been hit to a considerable height above the infield or the shallow outfield; a pop fly.
A folded paper element which pops up from a book, greeting card, etc.
A business that opens for a brief temporary period only, such as a temporary restaurant.
Common among the general public; generally accepted. [from 15th c.]
Liked by many people; generally pleasing, widely admired. [from 17th c.]
Pertaining to or deriving from the people or general public. [from 16th c.]
The state of being porous.
A measure of how porous a material is; the ratio of the volume of pores to the total volume
Any small cetacean of the family Phocoenidae, related to dolphins and whales.
(North America, imprecisely) Any small dolphin.
(nautical) Of or relating to port, the left-hand side of a vessel when facing the bow.

examples.english: A whistle blew, and the boat slowly began to pull out of port.
examples.chinese: 汽笛声响起，船开始慢慢地驶离港口。

current_entries.en_definition: A place on the coast at which ships can shelter, or dock to load and unload cargo or passengers.
An opening or doorway in the side of a ship, especially for boarding or loading; an embrasure through which a cannon may be discharged; a porthole.
(bowls, curling) A narrow opening between other players' bowls or stones wide enough for a delivered bowl or stone to pass through.

(transitive, military) To hold or carry (a weapon) with both hands so that it lies diagonally across the front of the body, with the barrel or similar part near the left shoulder and the right hand grasping the small of the stock; or, to throw (the weapon) into this position on command.
To paint or draw the likeness of.
(figuratively) To describe in words; to convey.
Control or occupancy of something for which one does not necessarily have private property rights.
The condition of being under the control of strong emotion or madness.
Ownership; taking, holding, keeping something as one's own.
The quality of being possible.
A thing possible; that which may take place or come into being.
An option or choice, usually used in context with future events.
A small piece of printed paper stuck on an item to be mailed, indicating that postage has been paid.
(figuratively, colloquial) A very small area.
(transitive) To repeat (an activity) as a way of improving one's skill in that activity.
(transitive) To perform or observe in an habitual fashion.
To put into practice; to carry out; to act upon; to commit; to execute; to do.
(transitive) To pursue (a career, especially law, fine art or medicine).
The pursuit of practicality over aesthetic qualities; a concentration on facts rather than emotions or ideals.

(philosophy) The idea that beliefs are identified with the actions of a believer, and the truth of beliefs with success of those actions in securing a believer's goals; the doctrine that ideas must be looked at in terms of their practical effects and consequences.
A small vehicle, usually covered, in which a newborn baby is pushed around in a lying position.

examples.english: My wife bought a new pram.
examples.chinese: 我太太買了一台新的嬰兒車。

current_entries.en_definition: (colloquial, loosely) A pushchair; a buggy.
A province of Tuscany, Italy.
The capital city of the province of Prato, Tuscany, Italy.
(religion) To direct words, thoughts, or one's attention to a deity or any higher being, for the sake of adoration, thanks, petition for help, etc.

examples.english: We all knelt down to pray.
examples.chinese: 我們都跪了下來祈禱。

current_entries.en_definition: (obsolete) To ask earnestly for; to seek to obtain by supplication; to entreat for.
Used for exact or precise measurement.
(broadly) The state of being precise or exact; especially, both exact and accurate.
(mathematics) The number of significant digits to which a value may be measured reliably.
(strictly) The ability of a measurement to be reproduced consistently.
(transitive) To make ready for a specific future purpose; to set up; to assemble or equip; to forearm.
(intransitive) To make oneself ready; to get ready, make preparation.
The fact or condition of being present, or of being within sight or call, or at hand.
A quality of poise and effectiveness that enables a performer to achieve a close relationship with their audience.
A quality that sets an individual out from others; a quality that makes them noticed and/or admired even if they are not speaking or performing.
Something (as a spirit) felt or believed to be present.
A device used to apply pressure to an item.
(uncountable, collective) The print-based media (both the people and the newspapers).
A printing machine.
(transitive) To force to a certain end or result; to urge strongly.
An assumption made beforehand; a preliminary conjecture or speculation.
The act of presupposing.
Any of various spiny cacti of the genus Opuntia.
The fruit, often edible, of such a plant.
The role or office of a priest.
Priests as a group.
Authority to act in the name of God or the divine in general.
First in importance, degree, or rank.
First in time, order, or sequence.
(mathematics, lay) Having exactly two integral factors: itself and unity (1 in the case of integers).
(now, _, rare) The earliest stage of something.
(algebra, number theory) A prime element of a mathematical structure, particularly a prime number.
To apply priming to (a musket or cannon); to apply a primer to (a metallic cartridge).
Someone who is preeminent in their field; a great person. [from 13th c.]

examples.english: The prince fell in love with a woodcutter's daughter.
examples.chinese: 王子愛上了一個樵夫的女兒。

current_entries.en_definition: The (male) ruler or head of a principality. [from 14th c.]
A male member of a royal family other than the ruler; especially (in the United Kingdom) the son or grandson of the monarch. [from 14th c.]
A fictional heroic prince in various fairy-tales.

(by extension) A heterosexual woman's prototypical ideal romantic partner, especially but not necessarily if he embodies common characteristics of the fictional princes, such as being courageous or chivalrous.
Primary; most important; first level in importance.

examples.english: The principal severely reproved the students whenever they made a mess in the hallway.
examples.chinese: 每次学生把走廊弄得一团糟的时候，校长都会严厉地训斥他们。

current_entries.en_definition: (finance, uncountable) The money originally invested or loaned, on which basis interest and returns are calculated.
(North America, Australia, New Zealand, Philippines) The chief administrator of a school.
(architecture, engineering) The construction that gives shape and strength to a roof, generally a truss of timber or iron; or, loosely, the most important member of a piece of framing.
(law) A legal person that authorizes another (the agent) to act on their behalf; or on whose behalf an agent or gestor in a negotiorum gestio acts.
A fundamental assumption or guiding belief.
A rule used to choose among solutions to a problem.
(physics) A rule or law of nature, or the basic idea on how the laws of nature are applied.
(geometry) A polyhedron with parallel ends of the same polygonal shape and size, the other faces being parallelogram-shaped sides.
(optics) A transparent block in the shape of a prism (sense 1), typically with triangular ends, used to reflect or refract light.
An event that is likely to occur.
The relative likelihood of an event happening.
(mathematics) A number, between 0 and 1, expressing the precise likelihood of an event happening.
A series of events leading to a result or product.
A path or succession of states through which a system passes.
(biology) Successive physiological responses to keep or restore health.
(transitive) To perform a particular process on a thing.
(economics) An individual or organization that creates goods and services.
(UK, Irish, slang) An arrest for speeding after which the driver is allowed seven (in the UK) or ten (in Ireland) days to produce his/her driving licence and related documents at a police station.
The act of producing, making or creating something. [from 15th c.]
The act of being produced.
The total amount produced.
(religion) A promise or vow made on entering a religious order. [from 12th c.]

examples.english: Teaching is a profession of my own choosing.
examples.chinese: 教书是我自己选择的职业。

current_entries.en_definition: The declaration of belief in the principles of a religion; hence, one's faith or religion. [from 16th c.]
A professional occupation.
An occupation, trade, craft, or activity in which one has a professed expertise in a particular area; a job, especially one requiring a high level of skill or training. [from 15th c.]

(accounting, economics) Total income or cash flow minus expenditures. The money or other benefit a non-governmental organization or individual receives in exchange for products and services sold at an advertised price.
(dated, literary) Benefit, positive result obtained.
(transitive) To benefit (somebody), be of use to (somebody).
(intransitive, construed with from) To benefit, gain.
Descending far below the surface; opening or reaching to great depth; deep.
Intellectually deep; entering far into subjects; reaching to the bottom of a matter, or of a branch of learning; thorough.
Characterized by intensity; deeply felt; pervading.
A forecast of the future course or outcome of a situation based on what is presently known; a prediction. [from mid 17th c.]
(medicine) A forecast of the future course or outcome of a disease or disorder based on current medical knowledge. [from mid 17th c.]
Specifically, advancement to a higher or more developed state; development, growth. [from 15th c.]

examples.english: In recent years, science has made remarkable progress.
examples.chinese: 这几年，科学取得了显著的进步。

current_entries.en_definition: Movement onwards, forwards, or towards a specific objective or direction; advance. [from 16th c.]
(intransitive) To move, go, or proceed forward; to advance.
Something which projects, protrudes, juts out, sticks out, or stands out.
The action of projecting or throwing or propelling something.
A forecast or prognosis obtained by extrapolation
Something that is owned.
A piece of real estate, such as a parcel of land.
The exclusive right of possessing, enjoying and disposing of a thing.
An attribute or abstract quality associated with an individual, object or concept.
An attribute or abstract quality which is characteristic of a class of objects.
Someone who speaks by divine inspiration.
Someone who predicts the future; a soothsayer.
(transitive) To forbid or prohibit.
(transitive) To denounce.
Engaging in sexual activity with another person for pay.
(by extension) Debasement for profit or impure motives.
A village in Zelenyi Pid settlement hromada, Kakhovka Raion, Kherson Oblast, Ukraine, founded in the 1930s, occupied by Russian forces since late February 2022.
A village in Bilokurakyne settlement hromada, Svatove Raion, Luhansk Oblast, Ukraine, founded in 1929, occupied by Russian forces since March 2022.

A village in Chernihivka settlement hromada, Berdiansk Raion, Zaporizhzhia Oblast, Ukraine, founded by Frisian Mennonites from West Prussia in May 1820, occupied by Russian forces since late February 2022.

(UK, historical) Government by a protector; especially, The Protectorate: government of England, Scotland, and Ireland between 1653 and 1659 under the Lord Protector of the Commonwealth Oliver Cromwell, later his son Richard Cromwell.

The authority assumed by a state over another state deemed inferior or dependent, whereby the former protects the latter from invasion and shares in the management of its affairs but the protected state retains its nominal sovereignty.

(biochemistry, countable) Any of numerous large, complex naturally-produced molecules composed of one or more long chains of amino acids, in which the amino acid groups are held together by peptide bonds.
(nutrition, uncountable) One of three major classes of food or source of food energy (4 kcal/gram) abundant in animal-derived foods (meat) and some vegetables, such as legumes.
(Greek god) A sea god who could change his shape at will.
(astronomy) The sixth satellite of the planet Neptune.

(international law, now, _, rare) An official record of a diplomatic meeting or negotiation; later specifically, a draft document setting out agreements to be signed into force by a subsequent formal treaty. [from 17th c.]
The official rules and guidelines for heads of state and other dignitaries, governing accepted behaviour in relations with other diplomatic representatives or over affairs of state. [from 19th c.]
(computing) A set of formal rules describing how to transmit or exchange data, especially across a network. [from 20th c.]
Feeling honoured (by something); feeling happy or satisfied about an event or fact; gratified.

examples.english: I am proud to be a part of this project.
examples.chinese: 我以身為這個計劃的一份子為榮。

current_entries.en_definition: Possessed of a due sense of what one deserves or is worth.
Standing out or raised; swollen.
(obsolete) Brave, valiant; gallant.
Generating a sense of pride; being a cause for pride.
(obsolete) Any commonly used turn of phrase expressing a metaphor, simile, or descriptive epithet. [before 18th c.]

examples.english: A rolling stone gathers no moss is a proverb.
examples.chinese: “滚石不生苔”是一句谚语。

current_entries.en_definition: (obsolete) A striking or paradoxical assertion; an obscure saying; an enigma; a parable.
(obsolete) A drama exemplifying a proverb.
Of, resembling, or expressed as a proverb, cliché, fable, or fairy tale.
Optionally placed before an element of a well-known proverb or metaphor to emphasize that the element is not being used in a literal sense (see Usage notes below)
Widely known; famous; stereotypical.
(chiefly, historical) A geographical area on the Baltic coast of Northeast Europe.

(historical) A former duchy, kingdom and (after German unification in 1871) a province of Germany, existing in various forms from 1525 to 1947 in parts of modern Germany, Poland and Russia; it originated from the historical region of Prussia and expanded over time through conquest.
A country known for exceptional military professionalism in her region. Historically used for Bulgaria as the "Prussia of the Balkans".
The study of the human mind.
The study of human or animal behavior.
The mental, emotional, and behavioral characteristics pertaining to a specified person, group, or activity.
A pterosaur of the genus Pterodactylus.
(loosely, proscribed) Any pterosaur.
The act of publishing printed or other matter.

examples.english: Publication of the article was timed to coincide with the professor's birthday.
examples.chinese: 文章的发表被预定在教授生日那天。

current_entries.en_definition: An issue of printed or other matter, offered for sale or distribution.
The communication of information to the general public etc.
(transitive) To issue (something, such as printed work) for distribution and/or sale.
(intransitive) To issue a medium (e.g. publication).
Any of various dishes, sweet or savoury, prepared by boiling or steaming, or from batter.

examples.english: Here's your pudding.
examples.chinese: 这是你的布丁。

current_entries.en_definition: A type of cake or dessert cooked usually by boiling or steaming.
A type of dessert that has a texture similar to custard or mousse but using some kind of starch as the thickening agent.
The round yellow or orange fruit of this plant.
The typical color of the ripe fruit of the pumpkin plant.
Having a strong taste that stings the tongue; said especially of hot (spicy) food, which has a strong and sharp or bitter taste.
(botany) Having a sharp and stiff point.

The act (action) or process of punishing, imposing and/or applying a sanction, typically by an authority or a person in authority (for example: a parent or teacher), especially when disappointed or dissatisfied with the behavior or actions of a child, student, or someone else being looked after.
A penalty to punish wrongdoing, especially for crime.
A suffering by pain or loss imposed as retribution.
(figuratively) Any harsh treatment or experience; rough handling.
An act or instance of the cleansing of pipes.
(transitive) To clean thoroughly; to rid of impurities; to cleanse.
(transitive) To free from sin, guilt, or burden.
(transitive, intransitive, medicine) To evacuate (the bowels or the stomach); to defecate or vomit.
(transitive, law) To clear of a charge, suspicion, or imputation.
(legal) The scope of a statute.
Scope or range of interest or control.
(transitive) To save or keep (something) to be used at a later time.
(transitive) To ignore or intentionally disregard (something), temporarily or permanently, so that more important things can occupy one's attention.
To cause someone to be out of sorts; to annoy, impose, inconvenience, or disturb.
(intransitive) To go out, to head out, especially (sailing) to set sail.
(intransitive, originally, _, US, _, slang) To consent to having sex.
To extinguish (fire).

(US politics) An anonymous poster on the Internet message boards 4chan, 8chan and 8kun, claiming to possess Q clearance, who originated a pro-Trump conspiracy theory claiming that Donald Trump is working against a cabal of Satanic, cannibalistic pedophiles comprised of his political opponents.
(US politics) The conspiracy theory originated by this anonymous poster.
(US politics) The movement supporting this conspiracy theory.
(grammar) A word, such as all or many, that expresses the quantity of a related noun.
(logic) An operator, such as the universal quantifier (written as ∀) or the existential quantifier (∃), used in predicate calculus to indicate the degree that predicate is true for a specified set.
A soft, creamy, unripened cheese made from cow's milk, originating from and eaten throughout central, northern, eastern, and southeastern Europe, as well as the Low Countries.

(particle) In the Standard Model, one of a number of elementary subatomic particles having fractional electric charge that forms matter. They are theorized not to exist in isolation, but only in combinations in hadrons such as neutrons and protons or in quark–gluon plasmas.
A province in eastern Canada. Capital: Quebec City. Largest city: Montreal.
The capital city of the province of Quebec, Canada.
A en given name.
A en given name occasionally used.
(typography) The punctuation mark "?", used at the end of a sentence to indicate a question.
Polygonia interrogationis, a North American nymphalid butterfly with a silver mark on the underside of its hindwing resembling a question mark (sense 1).
One-twentieth of a ream of paper; a collection of twenty-four or twenty-five sheets of paper of the same size and quality, unfolded or having a single fold.

(bookbinding) A set of leaves which are stitched together, originally a set of four pieces of paper (eight leaves, sixteen pages). This is most often a single signature (i.e. group of four), but may be several nested signatures.
The capital city of Ecuador.
The capital of Pichincha province, Ecuador
Happening every day; daily. [from 15th c.]
Having the characteristics of something which can be seen, experienced, etc, every day or very commonly. [from 15th c.]
(medicine, now, _, rare, historical) A fever which recurs every day; quotidian malaria. [from 14th c.]
(Anglicanism, historical) A daily allowance formerly paid to certain members of the clergy. [from 16th c.]
(usually with definite article) Commonplace or mundane things regarded as a class. [from 20th c.]
A province of Sicily, Italy.
The capital of Ragusa, Italy.
The property of all possible outcomes being equally likely.
(mathematics) A type of circumstance or event that is described by a probability distribution.
(transitive) To make rare, thin, porous, or less dense.
(intransitive) To become rare, thin or less dense.
The plant Rubus idaeus.
The juicy aggregate fruit of these plants.
(musical instruments) A musical instrument that makes a rattling sound. [from 17th c.]
A baby’s toy designed to make sound when shaken, usually containing loose grains or pellets in a hollow container. [from 16th c.]
A device which produces a loud rattling sound, especially one having a ratchet mechanism and spun round on a handle.
(obsolete) A scolding; a sharp rebuke. [17th–19th c.]
(transitive, obsolete) To scold; to rail at.
A material in its unprocessed, natural state considered usable for manufacture.
(figuratively) Any physical product serving as input to a factory or other installation which processes it.
(chemistry, intransitive) To act upon each other; to exercise a reciprocal or a reverse effect, as two or more chemical agents; to act in opposition.

examples.english: If someone irritates you, it is best not to react immediately.
examples.chinese: 如果有人激怒你，你最好不要立刻做出反应。

current_entries.en_definition: (chemistry, transitive) To cause chemical agents to react; to cause one chemical agent to react with another.
An action or statement in response to a stimulus or other event.
(chemistry) A transformation in which one or more substances is converted into another by combination or decomposition.
(chemistry, engineering) A structure used to contain chemical or other reactions.
(nuclear physics) A device which uses atomic energy to produce heat.
The state of being actual or real; realness.
A real entity, event, or other fact.
The entirety of all that is real.
An individual observer's own subjective perception of that which is real.
(chiefly, passive voice, slightly, _, formal) To convert (something imaginary or planned, as a goal or idea) into reality; to bring into real existence, to make real. [from early 17th c.]

examples.english: Life begins when we realize who we really are.
examples.chinese: 当我们明白真正的自己时，生活开始了。

current_entries.en_definition: To convert (an asset or property, especially investments such as bonds, shares, etc.) into a more easily usable form such as money, especially by selling the asset or property.
(archaic, or, legal, &, rhetoric) A territory or state, as ruled by an absolute authority, especially by a king; a kingdom. [from ca. 1300]
(also, figurative) A sphere of knowledge or of influence; a domain. [from after 1400]
Armed resistance to an established government or ruler.
Defiance of authority or control; the act of rebelling.
Reincarnation; new birth subsequent to one's first.
Revival, reinvigoration.
Spiritual renewal.
(transitive, dated) To take, as something that is offered; to accept.
(telecommunications) To detect a signal from a transmitter.
(sports) To be in a position to take possession, or hit back the ball.
The act of receiving.
(uncountable, electronics) The act or ability to receive radio or similar signals.
The desk of a hotel or office where guests are received.

(linguistics) Reading viewed as the active process of receiving a text in any medium (written, spoken, signed, multimodal, nonverbal), consisting of several steps, such as ideation, comprehension, reconstruction, interpretation.
A social engagement, usually to formally welcome someone.
(biochemistry, medicine) A protein on a cell wall that binds with specific molecules so that they can be absorbed into the cell in order to control certain functions.
(biology) Any specialized cell or structure that responds to sensory stimuli.
The act of recognizing or the condition of being recognized (matching a current observation with a memory of a prior observation of the same entity).

examples.english: She gave me a smile of recognition.
examples.chinese: 她給了我一個認可的微笑。

current_entries.en_definition: Honour, favourable note, or attention.
(transitive) To match (something or someone which one currently perceives) to a memory of some previous encounter with the same person or thing.
(transitive) To acknowledge the existence or legality of; to treat as valid or worthy of consideration.
(transitive, or with clause) To acknowledge or consider (as being a certain thing or having a certain quality or property).
The act of recollecting, or recalling to the memory; the act of recalling to memory.

examples.english: I have no recollection of seeing the man.
examples.chinese: 我沒有見過那男人的印象。

current_entries.en_definition: The power of recalling ideas to the mind, or the period within which things can be recollected; remembrance.
That which is recollected; something called to mind; a reminiscence.
(transitive) To bestow commendation on; to represent favourably; to suggest, endorse or encourage as an appropriate choice.
(transitive, archaic) To commit, confide to another's care, confidence or acceptance, with favoring representations
An act of recommending.
That which is recommended.
(ambitransitive) To restore a friendly relationship; to bring back or return to harmony.

examples.english: I would rather kill myself than reconcile myself to my fate.
examples.chinese: 与其向命运妥协，我宁可自杀。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To make things compatible or consistent.
In the Anglican Church, a cleric in charge of a parish and who owns the tithes of it.
(Eastern Orthodoxy, uncommon) A priest or bishop in the Orthodox Church who is in charge of a parish or in an administrative leadership position in a theological seminary or academy.
A headmaster or headmistress in various educational institutions, e.g., a university.
drawing upon itself, referring back.
(mathematics, not comparable) of an expression, each term of which is determined by applying a formula to preceding terms
(computing, not comparable) of a program or function that calls itself
(computing theory, not comparable, of a function) which can be computed by a theoretical model of a computer, in a finite amount of time
The state of being redundant
Duplication of components or circuits to provide survival of the total system in case of failure of single components.
Duplication of parts of a message to guard against transmission errors.
(sports) An umpire or judge; an official who makes sure the rules are followed during a game.
A person who settles a dispute.
To act as a referee.
(transitive) To bend back (light, etc.) from a surface.

examples.english: The manners and customs of a country reflect its culture.
examples.chinese: 一个国家的风俗习惯反映了它的文化。

current_entries.en_definition: (intransitive) To be bent back (light, etc.) from a surface.
(transitive) To mirror, or show the image of something.
(intransitive) To think seriously; to ponder or consider.
A state of safety, protection or shelter.

examples.english: My room is an inviolable refuge.
examples.chinese: 我的房間是不可侵犯的避難所。

current_entries.en_definition: A place providing safety, protection or shelter.

Any considerable and connected part of a space or surface; specifically, a tract of land or sea of considerable but indefinite extent; a country; a district; in a broad sense, a place without special reference to location or extent but viewed as an entity for geographical, social or cultural reasons.

examples.english: Pollution has a disastrous effect on the ecology of a region.
examples.chinese: 環境污染可以對一個區域的生態造成極大的影響。

current_entries.en_definition: An administrative subdivision of the European Union.
Emotional pain on account of something done or experienced in the past, with a wish that it had been different; a looking back with dissatisfaction or with longing.

examples.english: The time will come when you'll regret it.
examples.chinese: 你終有一天會後悔的。

current_entries.en_definition: (decision theory) The amount of avoidable loss that results from choosing the wrong action.
A person invited to an event who was unable to attend, but notified the organizer of this beforehand; a nonattendee.
To feel sorry about (a thing that has or has not happened), afterthink: to wish that a thing had not happened, that something else had happened instead.
(transitive) To say or do (something) for a second time, such as for emphasis.
(transitive) To say or do (something) repeatedly.
(intransitive) To be very happy, be delighted, exult; to feel joy. [from 14th c.]

examples.english: I rejoice in your success.
examples.chinese: 我为你的成功感到高兴。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To make happy, exhilarate. [from 15th c.]
The manner in which two things may be associated.

examples.english: I had a lot to say in relation to that affair.
examples.chinese: 關於那件事我有很多話要說。

current_entries.en_definition: A member of one's extended family; a relative.
Connection or association; the condition of being related.
Kinship; being related by blood or marriage.
A romantic or sexual involvement.
In a relative manner; with reference to environment or competition; contextually or comparatively.
(sometimes, proscribed) Somewhat; fairly.
(transitive) To make something loose.

examples.english: I want a massage. I need to relax.
examples.chinese: 我想要按摩。我需要放松。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To relieve (someone or someone's mind) of stress; to enable to rest; to calm down.
(transitive, dated) To relieve from constipation; to loosen; to open.
The quality of being reliable, dependable, or trustworthy.

(education) the ability to measure the same thing consistently (of a measurement indicating the degree to which the measure is consistent); that is, repeated measurements would give the same result (See also validity).
Something old and outdated, possibly kept for sentimental reasons.
(religion) A part of the body of a saint, or an ancient religious object, kept for veneration.
Unwillingness to do something.
Hesitancy in taking some action.
(physics) That property of a magnetic circuit analogous to resistance in an electric circuit.
The act of remembering; a holding in mind, or bringing to mind; recollection.
The state of being remembered, or held in mind; memory, recollection.
The power of remembering; the reach of personal knowledge; the period over which one's memory extends.
Someone or something that reminds.
(finance) Writing that reminds of open payments.
The act of sending money to someone.

examples.english: I'm sorry, without an I.D. you cannot receive a remittance.
examples.chinese: 对不起，没有身份证是不能领汇款的。

current_entries.en_definition: Money which is sent to someone, typically to someone in another country.
(music) A rearrangement of an older piece of music, possibly including various cosmetic changes.
(music) A piece of music formed by combining existing pieces of music together, possibly including various other cosmetic changes
(of a person) Feeling or filled with remorse.
Expressing or caused by remorse.
(by extension) Any similar artistic or intellectual revival.
(historical) The 14th-century revival of classical art, architecture, literature and learning that originated in Italy and spread throughout Europe over the following two centuries.
The period of this revival, typically lasting from the late 14th to the late 16th centuries; the transition from medieval to modern times.
The condition of being repentant, penitent.
A feeling of regret or remorse for doing wrong or sinning.

(UK) A position of employment; a post.
The ordinal form of the number six.
(not used in the plural) The person or thing in the sixth position.
One of six equal parts of a whole.
A trick-taking card game for three players, popular in Germany.
A widow of two cards in the game of skat.
A rapidly executed freehand drawing that is not intended as a finished work, often consisting of a multitude of overlapping lines.

examples.english: Jiro made a sketch of Mt. Fuji.
examples.chinese: 次郎畫了一幅富士山的素描。

current_entries.en_definition: A brief description of a person or account of an incident; a general presentation or outline.
A brief, light, or unfinished dramatic, musical, or literary work or idea; especially a short, often humorous or satirical scene or play, frequently as part of a revue or variety show.
(ambitransitive) To make a brief, basic drawing.
